task_description:
设计一个无畏契约战绩分析网站的主页设计图，输出为 PNG 格式。设计要求包括：
1. 顶部导航栏（logo、菜单、用户登录）
2. 英雄选择/战绩概览区域（展示玩家最常用的英雄、胜率、段位等）
3. 最近比赛记录列表（显示英雄、KDA、胜负、时间等）
4. 统计数据面板（总场次、总胜率、最强英雄等）
5. 底部页脚

设计风格参考无畏契约游戏风格（深色主题、科技感、蓝紫色调），输出到 ~/Desktop/valorant_design.png

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# 创建设计图
width, height = 1920, 1440
img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color='#0a0e27')  # 深色背景
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# 定义颜色
color_bg = '#0a0e27'       # 深色背景
color_primary = '#0f4c75'  # 蓝色
color_accent = '#7c3aed'   # 紫色
color_text = '#e8eaed'     # 浅色文字
color_secondary = '#3b82f6' # 次要蓝色
color_gold = '#fbbf24'      # 金色强调
color_red = '#ef4444'       # 红色（失败）
color_green = '#10b981'     # 绿色（胜利）

# 尝试加载系统字体
try:
    font_title = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 48)
    font_subtitle = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 32)
    font_normal = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 20)
    font_small = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 16)
except:
    font_title = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_subtitle = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_normal = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_small = ImageFont.load_default()

# ========== 1. 导航栏 ==========
navbar_height = 80
draw.rectangle([0, 0, width, navbar_height], fill=color_primary)

# Logo
draw.text((40, 20), '⚔️ VALORANT STATS', fill=color_gold, font=font_subtitle)

# 菜单项
menu_items = ['Dashboard', 'Matches', 'Heroes', 'Leaderboard']
menu_x = 500
for item in menu_items:
    draw.text((menu_x, 25), item, fill=color_text, font=font_normal)
    menu_x += 250

# 用户登录
draw.rectangle([1650, 15, 1880, 65], outline=color_accent, width=2)
draw.text((1700, 25), 'Login', fill=color_accent, font=font_normal)

# ========== 2. 英雄选择/战绩概览区域 ==========
hero_section_y = navbar_height + 40
hero_section_height = 300

# 背景区
draw.rectangle([40, hero_section_y, width-40, hero_section_y + hero_section_height], 
               outline=color_accent, width=2, fill=color_bg)

# 标题
draw.text((60, hero_section_y + 20), 'Your Performance', fill=color_gold, font=font_title)

# 英雄展示卡片（3个英雄）
hero_cards_y = hero_section_y + 80
hero_data = [
    {'name': 'REYNA', 'kills': '4.2', 'deaths': '1.8', 'winrate': '62%', 'color': color_secondary},
    {'name': 'JETT', 'kills': '3.8', 'deaths': '2.1', 'winrate': '58%', 'color': color_accent},
    {'name': 'SAGE', 'kills': '2.5', 'deaths': '3.2', 'winrate': '55%', 'color': color_green}
]

for idx, hero in enumerate(hero_data):
    card_x = 80 + idx * 520
    card_width = 480
    card_height = 180
    
    # 卡片背景
    draw.rectangle([card_x, hero_cards_y, card_x + card_width, hero_cards_y + card_height],
                   fill='#1a2847', outline=hero['color'], width=2)
    
    # 英雄名称
    draw.text((card_x + 20, hero_cards_y + 15), hero['name'], fill=color_gold, font=font_subtitle)
    
    # 统计数据
    stats_y = hero_cards_y + 70
    draw.text((card_x + 20, stats_y), f"K/D: {hero['kills']}/{hero['deaths']}", 
              fill=color_text, font=font_normal)
    draw.text((card_x + 280, stats_y), f"WinRate: {hero['winrate']}", 
              fill=color_green, font=font_normal)

# ========== 3. 段位和总体统计 ==========
rank_section_y = hero_section_y + hero_section_height + 40

# 段位显示
draw.text((60, rank_section_y), 'Current Rank: DIAMOND 3', fill=color_gold, font=font_subtitle)
draw.rectangle([60, rank_section_y + 50, 400, rank_section_y + 80], 
               fill=color_accent, outline=color_accent, width=2)
draw.text((80, rank_section_y + 55), '▮▮▮▮▮▮ 87 RR', fill=color_text, font=font_normal)

# ========== 4. 最近比赛记录 ==========
match_section_y = rank_section_y + 120
draw.text((60, match_section_y), 'Recent Matches', fill=color_gold, font=font_title)

# 表头
header_y = match_section_y + 60
draw.rectangle([40, header_y, width-40, header_y + 40], fill=color_primary)

headers = ['Hero', 'K/D/A', 'Score', 'Result', 'Duration', 'Date']
header_x = 60
for header in headers:
    draw.text((header_x, header_y + 10), header, fill=color_gold, font=font_normal)
    header_x += 280

# 比赛记录行
match_records = [
    {'hero': 'REYNA', 'kda': '18/4/7', 'score': '2450', 'result': 'WIN', 'duration': '28:45', 'date': '2 hrs ago'},
    {'hero': 'JETT', 'kda': '16/5/6', 'score': '2180', 'result': 'WIN', 'duration': '32:10', 'date': '5 hrs ago'},
    {'hero': 'SAGE', 'kda': '8/7/12', 'score': '1920', 'result': 'LOSS', 'duration': '26:30', 'date': '1 day ago'},
    {'hero': 'REYNA', 'kda': '22/3/5', 'score': '2780', 'result': 'WIN', 'duration': '29:15', 'date': '2 days ago'},
    {'hero': 'JETT', 'kda': '14/6/8', 'score': '2040', 'result': 'WIN', 'duration': '31:45', 'date': '3 days ago'},
]

row_y = header_y + 50
for match in match_records:
    # 背景交替
    if row_y % 100 < 50:
        draw.rectangle([40, row_y, width-40, row_y + 45], fill='#141d3b')
    
    # 比赛数据
    result_color = color_green if match['result'] == 'WIN' else color_red
    
    col_x = 60
    draw.text((col_x, row_y + 10), match['hero'], fill=color_secondary, font=font_normal)
    col_x += 280
    draw.text((col_x, row_y + 10), match['kda'], fill=color_text, font=font_normal)
    col_x += 280
    draw.text((col_x, row_y + 10), match['score'], fill=color_gold, font=font_normal)
    col_x += 280
    draw.text((col_x, row_y + 10), match['result'], fill=result_color, font=font_normal)
    col_x += 280
    draw.text((col_x, row_y + 10), match['duration'], fill=color_text, font=font_normal)
    col_x += 280
    draw.text((col_x, row_y + 10), match['date'], fill=color_text, font=font_small)
    
    row_y += 50

# ========== 5. 统计数据面板 ==========
stats_section_y = row_y + 60

stats_panels = [
    {'label': 'Total Matches', 'value': '287', 'x': 60},
    {'label': 'Win Rate', 'value': '58.5%', 'x': 520},
    {'label': 'Most Played', 'value': 'REYNA', 'x': 980},
    {'label': 'Avg K/D', 'value': '1.42', 'x': 1440},
]

for panel in stats_panels:
    panel_x = panel['x']
    panel_y = stats_section_y
    panel_width = 420
    panel_height = 150
    
    draw.rectangle([panel_x, panel_y, panel_x + panel_width, panel_y + panel_height],
                   fill='#141d3b', outline=color_accent, width=2)
    
    draw.text((panel_x + 20, panel_y + 20), panel['label'], fill=color_text, font=font_normal)
    draw.text((panel_x + 20, panel_y + 70), panel['value'], fill=color_gold, font=font_title)

# ========== 6. 底部页脚 ==========
footer_y = stats_section_y + 200
footer_height = 80

draw.rectangle([0, footer_y, width, height], fill=color_primary)
draw.text((60, footer_y + 20), '© 2026 Valorant Stats Analytics | Privacy | Terms | Contact',
          fill=color_text, font=font_small)
draw.text((1200, footer_y + 20), 'Designed by Designer Duck 🦆',
          fill=color_gold, font=font_small)

# 保存为PNG
output_path = '/Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_design.png'
img.save(output_path, 'PNG')
print(f'✅ Design saved to: {output_path}')
print(f'Image size: {width}x{height} pixels')

action_checkpoints.reasoning: 根据任务要求，需要创建一个无畏契约风格的战绩分析网站主页设计图。我将使用 Python + Pillow 库绘制各个 UI 组件，包括顶部导航栏、英雄选择区、比赛记录、统计数据和页脚，采用深色主题+蓝紫色调，最终输出 PNG 格式的设计图到 /Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_design.png。
